clientMessages.content:
Hey <@324248559421620224> hope you've been doing well.

Your ads are still paused. I wanna do whatever I can to help you out scaling this business. What can we do to get this goin?

What is the plan from here? I want to make sure the leads we already generated convert, and to make sure moving forward we'll get a lot more coming in, and when they do they'll be handled properly.
